    • formulaFactoryNoCurrentProof

      @Deprecated public void formulaFactoryNoCurrentProof() throws Exception
      Deprecated.
      Ensures that the user support returns the factory of the corresponding proof obligation file when no proof has been selected.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • formulaFactoryCurrentProof

      @Deprecated public void formulaFactoryCurrentProof() throws Exception
      Deprecated.
      Ensures that the user support returns the factory of the current proof tree, independently of the factory of the proof obligation file.
      Throws:
      Exception
